2198810.name: 重整中
2198810.description: Eeeek Abyss is a Cthulhu style multi-player platform game. You can play as the unknown evil to invade Taiwan cities. You can destroy buildings and fight against the powerful enemies hidden in the cities. Up to 4 players in 1 screen in co-op multi-player game. Let's destroy as you wish, and search the secrets hidden in the cities!
